latin: Aut heros morieris aut tam diu vives ut te ipsum nequam fieri videas. hoc fatum omnium est qui iustitiam quaerunt in mundo corrupto.

questions.prompt: What are the two possible fates described?
questions.target: Die a hero or live long enough to become the villain
choices: Die a hero or live long enough to become the villain

questions.target: Those who seek justice in a corrupt world
choices: Those who seek justice in a corrupt world

translation: Either you die a hero or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain. This is the fate of all who seek justice in a corrupt world.
